RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0039 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: James Okafor Date of Birth: 17/09/1968 SSN (tokenized): TKN-616607 Annual Income: $164,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $35,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Pune Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN50971AL Tesla Sportage 2020 EV Used 32,000 Authorized Signature: James Okafor
